title: SIGILL (ud2) crash in coroutine actor for fork/join with large generated designs

features.name: fork_join_in_initial_with_large_generated_design
features.description: Code should include fork/join block with multiple concurrent tasks inside an initial block, combined with a large DUT containing many generate blocks and BRAM instances

features.name: fork_branches_without_suspension_points
features.description: Code should include fork/join where both branch tasks are called as regular functions returningVlCoroutine temporaries that are immediately discarded, with no internal suspension points (no wait statements or delays)

features.name: fork_join_workaround_with_always_block
features.description: Code should include an always block代替fork/join for concurrent capture operations, demonstrating the workaround that avoids coroutine codegen
